linkedin.text: Barcelona doesn't do ordinary — and neither should your next event. 🌅 Rooftop receptions over Gaudí skylines, gala dinners in Modernist palaces, beach-club afterparties as the Mediterranean glows. We handle venue sourcing, transfers, production and a local team that knows every doorway in the city. The result: an event your delegates feel in their bones long after the flight home. Thinking Barcelona for 2026? Tell us your headcount and we'll send a tailored venue shortlist within 48 hours. 📩 #UproductionEvents #IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #Barcelona #EventDestination #MICE #GalaDinner #CorporateTravel
